_backup_note: Snapshot of SyncView Calendar — Linear Status Sync (MJbMZ789B5ExZz9x) taken 2026-06-12 during Phase 1 prep of the Sheets→Supabase realtime migration (CALENDAR_REALTIME_MIGRATION.md), before any workflow edits. Single code node driven by the Linear Issue webhook (POST /webhook/linear-status-sync). IMPORTANT for the migration: this workflow does NOT touch the Google Sheet directly — it reads via the calendar-get webhook and writes via the calendar-upsert-post webhook (sub-status-only patches), so once calendar-upsert-post dual-writes, this workflow inherits dual-write for free. Secrets are redacted in this copy: [REDACTED-LINEAR-KEY] is a live Linear API key hardcoded in the 'Handle Linear Event' jsCode (LINEAR_KEY const) — restore the real value from n8n if ever re-importing. n8n cloud's own workflow version history is the authoritative rollback path.
name: SyncView Calendar — Linear Status Sync
